course.title: Compliance & Ethics Fundamentals
course.subtitle: Workplace conduct, integrity, and safety
course.description: Core principles of ethics, anti-bribery, data privacy, conflicts of interest, and speak-up culture.

questions.prompt: You suspect a coworker is falsifying expense reports. What is the best first step?

options.text: Confront them publicly at the next team meeting
Report the concern via the company hotline or to Compliance
Ignore it; it’s not your responsibility
Post about it on social media

questions.explanation: Use official speak-up channels: hotline or Compliance.
